final_prompt.prompt:
Create a whimsical underwater fairy-tale scene (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a 梦幻童话 (dreamy fairy-tale) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a mermaid swimming among coral reefs, glowing jellyfish, and a sunken ship with treasure
Scene/backdrop: must include an underwater world with light rays penetrating from the sea surface
Lighting/mood: needs light rays penetrating from above creating a dreamlike atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be vibrant and dreamlike — exact color values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
